schemas.$comment: Derived Action type for the duplicate-entry-instance stress test. Inherits the base Action contract (type, target, payload, timeout, required) via allOf — no fields are added or narrowed. The mediator routes by (extensionInstanceId, actionType) so an action targeted at one instance does not reach another; per-entry validation enforces that only entries declaring this action in their actions[] (fixture-a's entry) accept it.
